answers.where: Hangar on the stylized studs floor with the Assault Walker, Sentinel display, and new CC0 Kenney sci-fi gate/corridor/room props dressing the arena.
answers.action: Inspect the hangar/showroom and press Battle.
answers.response: The world now uses downloaded CC0 sci-fi station props instead of only procedural block dressing.
answers.reward: The visual pipeline can now add Roblox-like toy station variety from a legal world-prop kit.
answers.game_look: Sourced mechs, CC0 sci-fi station props, studs floor, toy-block colors, readable font HUD, and a clear Battle button make the first screen read more like a casual Roblox-like mech showroom.

issues.text: Kenney Modular Space Kit props add a real CC0 sci-fi station silhouette, but the first pass still uses flat runtime colors and needs textured/material support and tighter scene composition.
